title: Isekai Gourmet de Nariagari Musou
description: After being abandoned in the mountains, I started enjoying a carefree camping life—only to end up accidentally racking up some unbelievable achievements! As I tamed holy beasts and dominated every challenge, the ones who cast me out began to fall apart on their own... And for some reason, now I'm suddenly super popular!? A thrilling comeuppance fantasy packed with harem antics and gourmet adventures!
